details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Makefile, extracted the actual file content via browser automation, and correctly reported VERSION = 7 and PATCHLEVEL = 0 (with additional corroborating details SUBLEVEL = 0, EXTRAVERSION = -rc5, NAME = Baby Opossum Posse). The output clearly shows the real Makefile content was read from the page.
